deviations.what: Named-model wall-break: the original drives the footer toolbar button visibility from a separate 'range' media JSON model ({range>/isNoPhone}, isNotPhoneOrTablet, isTablet, isPhoneOrTablet). abap2UI5 keeps the flags flat in the one default model; the frontend (view1_js) aliases that model under 'range', so the faithful {range>/...} paths resolve. Values use the desktop media ranges (the original filled them from Device.media - a client-only decision). Button presses show client toasts (original onPress/onOpen).
